title: The Guildmaster's Trust
description: You've proven yourself time and again. Guildmaster Nightshade has one final test - the most ambitious heist in Guild history. A treasure convoy carrying priceless artifacts travels from Kazer-Dun Entrance through Elder Moor. Plan the heist, assemble your team, and execute it perfectly. Success means becoming Nightshade's right hand.

objectives.description: Scout the convoy route from Kazer-Dun Entrance
Choose ambush location (affects difficulty and rewards)
Recruit team members (specialists improve success chance)
Acquire necessary supplies (rope, smoke bombs, etc.)

ambush_locations.name: forest_narrows
ambush_locations.description: Heavy cover, easy to hide, convoy slows down

ambush_locations.name: bridge_crossing
ambush_locations.description: Risky but convoy is trapped if you control bridge

available_specialists.name: locksmith_quinn
available_specialists.bonus: Faster access to secured cargo, +15% loot

available_specialists.name: enforcer_brick
available_specialists.bonus: Better at fighting guards, reduces casualties

available_specialists.name: face_silverton
available_specialists.bonus: Can talk way past some guards, reduces combat

phases.name: approach
phases.description: Close in on convoy without being spotted

phases.name: escape
phases.description: Escape with loot before reinforcements arrive

failure_states.consequence: Convoy is prepared, +2 guards, harder combat
Can't access best loot, reduced rewards
Must drop some loot, potential team casualties

shadow_equipment_set.bonuses: Major stealth bonuses, lockpicking bonus, night vision

guildmasters_signet.effect: Identifies you as Guildmaster's Hand - all thieves recognize authority
guildmasters_signet.mechanical: Access to Guild resources, can recruit thieves for jobs

notes: Final Thieves Guild quest. Complex multi-phase heist with planning. Team recruitment mechanic. Multiple approaches and outcomes. Convoy travels from Kazer-Dun Entrance through Elder Moor. Ultimate rewards: Shadow Equipment Set and Guildmaster's Hand rank.
